title: penstemon personatus
intro: Penstemon personatus, also known as the Person's beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Penstemon personatus can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in a tincture or salve to apply topically.
